category.scope_note: Air-source heat pumps and split-system air conditioners exported from China to Bangladesh

title.en: China-to-Bangladesh Air-source Heat Pump Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国空气源热泵进入孟加拉国：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國空氣源熱泵進入孟加拉國：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China air-source heat pump documentation against Bangladesh's BSTI mandatory certification framework, BERC and SREDA energy-efficiency requirements, BTRC radio and EMC obligations, DoE refrigerant and ODS controls, and BDS electrical safety standards for imported air conditioners and heat pumps.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国空气源热泵文件与孟加拉国BSTI强制认证框架、BERC和SREDA能效要求、BTRC无线电及电磁兼容义务、环境部制冷剂和ODS管制，以及进口空调与热泵的BDS电气安全标准的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國空氣源熱泵文件與孟加拉國BSTI強制認證框架、BERC和SREDA能效要求、BTRC無線電及電磁相容義務、環境部制冷劑和ODS管制，以及進口空調與熱泵的BDS電氣安全標準的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment body decision, BSTI filing, BERC approval, BTRC type-approval, DoE permit, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, distributors, and installers should verify current BSTI mandatory product lists, BDS standard editions, SREDA energy-label scope, BERC requirements, BTRC type-approval obligations, DoE ODS and refrigerant permit requirements, and applicable pre-shipment inspection rules with qualified professionals before shipment, sale, or installation.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、符合性评定机构决定、BSTI申报、BERC批准、BTRC型式认可、环境部许可、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商、经销商和安装方在出货、销售或安装前应与合格专业人士核验当前BSTI强制产品目录、BDS标准版本、SREDA能效标签范围、BERC要求、BTRC型式认可义务、环境部ODS及制冷剂许可要求和适用的装船前检验规定。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、符合性評定機構決定、BSTI申報、BERC批准、BTRC型式認可、環境部許可、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商、經銷商和安裝方在出貨、銷售或安裝前應與合格專業人士核驗當前BSTI強制產品目錄、BDS標準版本、SREDA能效標籤範圍、BERC要求、BTRC型式認可義務、環境部ODS及制冷劑許可要求和適用的裝船前檢驗規定。

answer_first.en: BSTI mandatory certification (BSTI mark) with pre-shipment inspection for listed electrical goods including imported air conditioners and heat pumps, BDS/IEC 60335-2-40 electrical safety compliance, SREDA/BERC energy-label direction, DoE ODS and refrigerant permit for R-22 phase-down, and BTRC type-approval for wireless-enabled units are the major Bangladesh compliance gaps for Chinese air-source heat pumps. Grid compatibility (220 V / 50 Hz) is excellent. CCC is not recognised.
answer_first.zh: BSTI强制认证（BSTI标志）及进口空调和热泵等列管电气产品的装船前检验、BDS/IEC 60335-2-40电气安全合规、SREDA/BERC能效标签方向、环境部ODS及R-22逐步淘汰的制冷剂许可，以及无线功能机型的BTRC型式认可，是中国空气源热泵进入孟加拉国的主要合规差距。电网兼容性优良（220 V / 50 Hz）。CCC不予认可。
answer_first.zht: BSTI強制認證（BSTI標誌）及進口空調和熱泵等列管電氣產品的裝船前檢驗、BDS/IEC 60335-2-40電氣安全合規、SREDA/BERC能效標籤方向、環境部ODS及R-22逐步淘汰的制冷劑許可，以及無線功能機型的BTRC型式認可，是中國空氣源熱泵進入孟加拉國的主要合規差距。電網相容性優良（220 V / 50 Hz）。CCC不予認可。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or upon BSTI / BERC / BTRC / DoE regulatory update
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true.
